properties.name: os.hardware.enabled
properties.description: Enable the HardwareAPI bean (processor, memory, disk, display, GPU, USB, sound card, network interface, power source, computer system).

properties.name: os.network.enabled
properties.description: Enable the NetworkAPI bean (DNS, IP stats, listening ports, routes, TCP/UDP connections, public IP).

properties.name: os.operating-system.enabled
properties.description: Enable the OsAPI bean (OS info, environment detection, environment variables, aliases).

properties.name: os.ssh.enabled
properties.description: Enable the SshAPI bean (remote command execution, file transfer, authorized_keys management). Requires SSHJ on the classpath.
